description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the golang:1.19 Docker image with a before_script that updates apt and installs libavcodec-dev, libavformat-dev, libavutil-dev, and libswscale-dev. Define two stages: build and test. In the build stage add a build job that runs go build ./... . In the test stage add a test job that runs test -z "$(gofmt -l . | tee /dev/stderr)" to ensure code is formatted, then go test ./..., installs golangci-lint v1.50.1 via curl -sfL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/golangci/golangci-lint/master/install.sh | sh -s -- -b $(go env GOPATH)/bin v1.50.1, and finally executes golangci-lint run -v. The pipeline has no caches, artifacts, or conditional rules.
